statement: In every magma, Equation 1907 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (x * w)`) implies Equation 1680 (`x = (x * y) * ((z * w) * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0922
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op x w))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op x y) (op (op z w) u))
